text: Now I can query for HIGH-urgency incidents in the 'triggered' state:

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, service, urgency, status, assignee, created_at FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE urgency = 'high' AND status = 'triggered'"}
